purpose: PayOS full frontend handoff for subscription checkout, return handling, and post-checkout verification.

queryParams.name: intentId
queryParams.source: Present only when backend can map successful PayOS orderCode to a PaymentIntent

requiredBehavior: If status=success and intentId exists, call GET /api/payments/{intentId}.
If intent status is not final yet, poll GET /api/payments/{intentId} briefly until status is Succeeded, Canceled, or Expired.
After Succeeded, call GET /api/subscriptions/me/current to refresh active subscription UI.
If status=failed or intentId is missing, show failure state and let user return to subscription plans.
Offer user a way to go back to subscription plans.
If FE still has a local intentId from checkout state, optionally call GET /api/payments/{intentId} to show the current backend status.

flow.name: Create subscription purchase
flow.frontendAction: User chooses a plan and billing cycle.
frontendDecision: If requiresPayment=false, skip PayOS and refresh subscription state.
If requiresPayment=true, keep paymentIntentId and continue to step 3.

flow.name: Create PayOS checkout
flow.frontendAction: Ask backend to create/reuse a PayOS checkout link for the payment intent.

bodyParams.name: returnUrl
bodyParams.description: Leave null or omit it so backend uses Modules__Subscription__PayOS__ReturnUrl and can normalize redirect result.

frontendDecision: Persist intentId in local checkout state before redirecting.
Do not show success just because checkoutUrl was created.

flow.name: PayOS webhook
backendBehavior: Backend verifies payload.signature from PayOS JSON body.
Backend updates PaymentIntent, PaymentTransaction, Subscription, and SubscriptionHistory when payment succeeds.
Webhook always returns HTTP 200 JSON ack, including ignored/error cases.

flow.name: PayOS return redirect
flow.frontendAction: User returns from PayOS through backend return endpoint.
flow.handledBy: PayOS redirects browser to backend, then backend redirects browser to frontend.

flow.name: Verify result on frontend
flow.frontendAction: Read the real backend payment status after redirect.
frontendDecision: status=0 or 1 means not final; FE may poll briefly because webhook/reconcile can finish after redirect.

flow.name: Refresh current subscription
flow.frontendAction: After successful payment, refresh the user's current subscription.

response.body: SubscriptionModel or null depending on backend state

doNotDo: Do not send frontend URL as returnUrl unless FE intentionally wants to bypass backend /api/payments/payos/return.
Do not treat PayOS query params alone as proof of success.
Do not depend on webhook response in FE; FE never calls webhook.
Do not send enum names like Monthly or Yearly; backend expects numeric enum values.
Do not assume admin token can read any user's PaymentIntent through GET /api/payments/{intentId}; current runtime checks owner.

recommendedFrontendStateMachine.redirectingToPayOs: Browser is being redirected to checkoutUrl.
recommendedFrontendStateMachine.returnedFromPayOs: Frontend is on /payment/result with status and optional intentId.
recommendedFrontendStateMachine.verifying: GET /api/payments/{intentId} polling or reading latest state.
recommendedFrontendStateMachine.succeeded: PaymentIntent.status=2 and subscription refresh has completed.
recommendedFrontendStateMachine.failed: Return status failed, PaymentIntent.status=3/4, or verification fails.

cases: 400 when request body is invalid, plan inactive, or billing cycle unsupported.
400 when intent is already Succeeded, Canceled, Expired, expired by time, PayOS config is missing, or PayOS rejects create-link.
404 when intent does not exist or does not belong to current user.
404 when intent does not exist or does not belong to current user.

minimalFrontendImplementationChecklist: Use numeric billingCycle values: 0 Monthly, 1 Yearly.
Leave payos/create returnUrl null or omitted.
Persist intentId before redirecting to checkoutUrl.
On /payment/result, call GET /api/payments/{intentId} and then GET /api/subscriptions/me/current.
Show pending state when PaymentIntent status is RequiresPayment or Processing.
Show success only when PaymentIntent status is Succeeded.
Show failed/canceled/expired state for Canceled or Expired.
